summary: Comprehensive testing of Ready for Guests Connect cleaning service booking app completed. Backend APIs are 100% functional, admin dashboard working perfectly. Minor frontend validation issue found in client registration form.

ui_bugs.issue: Form validation preventing submission even when all fields are properly filled
ui_bugs.details: Backend registration API works fine, but frontend form validation is blocking submission

passed_tests: API Health Check - Backend connectivity verified
Admin Login - Successfully logged in with provided credentials (info.readyforguestssa@gmail.com / BigBoss2026)
Services API - 27 services properly seeded and accessible
Admin Stats API - Dashboard statistics working correctly (2 bookings, 2 pending, 0 completed, 4 clients, 1 team)
Teams API - Default 'Hibiscus Housekeepers' team found
Gallery API - 4 seeded gallery images accessible
Client Registration API - Backend registration working via API
Booking Creation API - Backend booking workflow functional
Team Assignment API - Admin can assign teams to bookings
Landing Page Load - Hero image and navigation working
Admin Dashboard - All tabs (Overview, Bookings, Teams, Clients, Gallery) functional
Admin Dashboard Stats - Shows correct statistics
Admin Notifications - Badge count and dropdown functionality working
Admin Team Assignment - Dropdown and assignment functionality visible
Authentication Flow - Admin login/logout working correctly
Gallery Display - 4 images properly displayed in admin gallery
Services Listing - All 27 services accessible and properly categorized
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix client registration form validation issue - the form prevents submission even when all required fields are filled. Backend API works fine, issue is in frontend form validation logic.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Admin dashboard fully functional, client registration form has validation issue
